summary: Tested MOJO Profile Modal with inline editors and auto-save feature. All core functionality is WORKING correctly. Successfully verified: Modal opens from pet avatar click, Soul Profile editor with dropdowns, Diet editor with text inputs, Health Vault editor, and auto-save feature triggers after 1.5s debounce and persists data.
critical_code_review_comments: useAutoSave hook implementation is correct - uses useRef to store onSave callback to avoid stale closure issues
AutoSaveIndicator component shows proper status transitions (idle -> pending -> saving -> saved)
All 9 section editors are properly implemented with appropriate field types (SelectField, TextField, TagsField, MultiSelect)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MOJO Profile Modal is fully functional. Test flow: Login -> Click 'Ask Mira' -> Click pet avatar (top-left with soul score) -> Modal opens showing Soul Profile, Health Vault, Diet & Food, Behaviour & Training, Grooming & Care sections. Click 'Edit' button on any section to open inline editor. Changes auto-save after 1.5s of inactivity. Indicator shows: 'Unsaved changes' -> 'Saving...' -> 'Saved' -> (idle). Data persists after closing/reopening modal.
features_tested: MOJO Modal opens from pet avatar click - WORKING
Soul Profile Editor with dropdowns (Temperament, Energy Level, etc.) - WORKING
Diet & Food Editor with select and text fields - WORKING
Health Vault Editor with text inputs - WORKING
Auto-save feature triggers after 1.5s debounce - WORKING
Auto-save indicator shows 'Unsaved changes' on edit - WORKING
Auto-save indicator disappears after save completes - WORKING
Data persists after closing and reopening modal - WORKING
